# conv

Renders `<conv>conv-xxx-yyy</conv>` inline as a clickable chip that opens the
referenced conversation in a side pane. Resolves the title and current status
via `useConversationById`; falls back to the raw id if the conversation isn't
in the index yet.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders <conv>conv-xxx</conv> as a clickable chip that opens the referenced conversation in a side pane.
- Contributes:
  - `ActiveData.Tag` → `ConvChip`
